notes: PR #54 regression case. The URL fragment #hYV97ShC disambiguates a 2019/2020 LaLiga match. The HAR's react-event-header JSON contains the most-recent (2024/2025) match data: Leganes 0-1 Barcelona on 2025-04-12. The DOM (rendered client-side from the fragment) shows the actual 2019/2020 match: Barcelona 2-0 Leganes on 2020-06-16. Asserting on the DOM values verifies that match-details extraction reads from the DOM, not the stale JSON.
